questions: What is the patient's pain level and duration (acute/moderate/mild-moderate/chronic)?
Does the patient have a history of gastric irritation, nausea, vomiting, dyspepsia, GI ulceration, perforation, haemorrhage, or renal toxicity? (Yes/No)
Is the patient on antihypertensive therapy? (Yes/No)
Does the patient have leucopenia, thrombocytopenia, or agranulocytosis? (Yes/No)
Does the patient have a known allergy to NSAIDs? (Yes/No)
Does the patient have persistent swelling, constitutional symptoms, or mechanical symptoms (locking, frequent giving away sensations)? (Yes/No)
Does the patient have severe deformities, contractures, or advanced disease with intractable pain affecting ADLs? (Yes/No)
